Arjun Desai

PROJECTS

invalidation; achieved 8.2K GitHub stars and 150K+ monthly
transaction latency by 47ms (18% improvement) for 50K+ daily
npm downloads within 6 months of launch
requests; code merged to production within 2 days

Designed and implemented comprehensive unit/integration test
algorithms reducing memory usage by 58% compared to
suite increasing coverage from 62% to 89%, preventing 3 critical
standard Redis implementations; benchmarks published in blog
bugs in staging

load time from 3.2s to 840ms (74% reduction)

indexing strategy, reducing API response time by 65% for user StreamSync | 2023–2024

onboarding endpoints serving 2M+ monthly active users

latency; 3.1K GitHub stars and active maintenance with 14

contributors

deep-dive (1.8K medium.com claps)

Python, FastAPI, Vue.js, ClickHouse

Built full-stack web application for application performance
memory footprint by 52% (from 2.8GB to 1.3GB per worker
monitoring; supports 4M+ metric ingestion per minute with
node) without compromising query latency
<500ms query response time across 90-day retention
Designed schema migrations framework supporting 0-downtime
Designed novel columnar data compression technique reducing
deployments across 45K+ customer databases; reduced

Wise | Sep 2024–Present attendees)
Graduate Software Engineer

Deployed real-time FX rate caching layer (Redis) decreasing President, organized weekly technical workshops and secured
quote latency by 340ms (92% improvement) and reducing £12K sponsorship from industry partners
database load by 67% across 15 backend instances

Cambridge Summer Researcher (CS Program)
Completed 8-week research internship on distributed systems
optimization; co-authored paper on consensus algorithms
achieving 34% latency reduction

mentor feedback scores averaged 4.8/5.0

2024

Maintain 2 core libraries with 180K+ weekly PyPI downloads; RPS' (ESEC 2024, 380 attendees); session feedback: 4.7/5.0;
triaged and resolved 240+ issues and merged 95 community published accompanying 22-page technical report with 8.3K
PRs from 45+ contributors worldwide downloads
Authored 3 technical documentation guides and 2 architectural Facilitated full-day workshop on 'Production-Grade Go for
RFCs; community feedback: 4.9/5.0 average helpfulness rating Backend Engineers' at 3 major conferences; trained 180+
across 1.2K responses engineers; post-workshop survey: 94% would recommend
SKILLS
